head:
<meta charset="utf-8"/>
<meta content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0" name="viewport"/>
<title>Workplace Safety Fundamentals | Premium E-Learning</title>
<script src="https://cdn.tailwindcss.com?plugins=forms,container-queries"></script>
<link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Space+Grotesk:wght@300;400;500;600;700&family=Inter:wght@300;400;500;600&display=swap" rel="stylesheet"/>
<link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Material+Symbols+Outlined:wght,FILL@100..700,0..1&display=swap" rel="stylesheet"/>
<link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Material+Symbols+Outlined:wght,FILL@100..700,0..1&display=swap" rel="stylesheet"/>
<script id="tailwind-config">
        tailwind.config = {
            darkMode: "class",
            theme: {
                extend: {
                    colors: {
                        "tertiary": "#e9ddff",
                        "error": "#ffb4ab",
                        "error-container": "#93000a",
                        "on-tertiary-fixed": "#ffffff",
                        "on-error": "#690005",
                        "surface-tint": "#c6c6c7",
                        "surface-container-high": "#2a2a2a",
                        "surface-container-lowest": "#0e0e0e",
                        "inverse-on-surface": "#303030",
                        "background": "#131313",
                        "surface-container": "#1f1f1f",
                        "inverse-surface": "#e2e2e2",
                        "surface-bright": "#393939",
                        "on-primary": "#1a1c1c",
                        "tertiary-fixed": "#6d3bd7",
                        "on-secondary-container": "#d8e2ff",
                        "secondary-fixed": "#adc6ff",
                        "on-primary-fixed-variant": "#e2e2e2",
                        "on-primary-fixed": "#ffffff",
                        "secondary-fixed-dim": "#81aaff",
                        "secondary": "#adc6ff",
                        "on-tertiary-container": "#000000",
                        "on-surface-variant": "#c6c6c6",
                        "primary-container": "#d4d4d4",
                        "surface-dim": "#131313",
                        "on-tertiary": "#23005c",
                        "surface": "#131313",
                        "primary-fixed-dim": "#454747",
                        "on-secondary-fixed-variant": "#00397f",
                        "on-secondary": "#001a42",
                        "surface-container-highest": "#353535",
                        "on-error-container": "#ffdad6",
                        "on-secondary-fixed": "#001a42",
                        "inverse-primary": "#5d5f5f",
                        "outline": "#919191",
                        "tertiary-fixed-dim": "#5516be",
                        "outline-variant": "#474747",
                        "surface-container-low": "#1b1b1b",
                        "tertiary-container": "#a078ff",
                        "on-surface": "#e2e2e2",
                        "primary": "#ffffff",
                        "on-tertiary-fixed-variant": "#e9ddff",
                        "surface-variant": "#353535",
                        "on-background": "#e2e2e2",
                        "secondary-container": "#004395",
                        "on-primary-container": "#000000",
                        "primary-fixed": "#5d5f5f"
                    },
                    fontFamily: {
                        "headline": ["Space Grotesk"],
                        "body": ["Inter"],
                        "label": ["Inter"]
                    },
                    borderRadius: {"DEFAULT": "1rem", "lg": "2rem", "xl": "3rem", "full": "9999px"},
                },
            },
        }
    </script>
<style>
        body { background-color: #131313; color: #e2e2e2; font-family: 'Inter', sans-serif; }
        .material-symbols-outlined { font-variation-settings: 'FILL' 0, 'wght' 400, 'GRAD' 0, 'opsz' 24; }
        .glass-nav { backdrop-filter: blur(20px); border-bottom: 1px solid rgba(71, 71, 71, 0.15); }
        details summary::-webkit-details-marker { display: none; }
        .bento-grid { display: grid; grid-template-columns: repeat(12, 1fr); gap: 1.5rem; }
        .custom-scrollbar::-webkit-scrollbar { width: 4px; }
        .custom-scrollbar::-webkit-scrollbar-track { background: #0e0e0e; }
        .custom-scrollbar::-webkit-scrollbar-thumb { background: #353535; border-radius: 10px; }
    </style>
